mainQuestData.content: Main quest data entry. This tracks the primary objective and current quest status.

sideQuests.content: Side quest data entry. Tracks optional missions and secondary objectives.

questItems.content: Quest items entry. Tracks key items and quest rewards.

tavern.content: Tavern location entry. A common gathering place for adventurers.

cave.content: Cave location entry. Dark and mysterious underground passages.

town.content: Town location entry. A bustling center of commerce and culture.

hero.content: Hero NPC entry. The main protagonist of the story.

villain.content: Villain NPC entry. The main antagonist opposing the hero.

ally.content: Ally NPC entry. A helpful companion aiding the hero.

mentor.content: Mentor NPC entry. A wise figure providing guidance and training.

merchant.content: Merchant NPC entry. Sells various goods and items.

guard.content: Guard NPC entry. Provides security and protection.

day.content: Day time entry. The bright hours of daylight.

night.content: Night time entry. The dark hours under the moon.

hour.content: Hour time entry. Specific time tracking.

kingdom.content: Kingdom world state entry. The current state of the kingdom.

empire.content: Empire world state entry. The current state of the empire.

war.content: War world state entry. Current conflicts and battles.

sword.content: Sword weapon entry. A versatile melee weapon.

bow.content: Bow weapon entry. A ranged weapon for distance attacks.

dagger.content: Dagger weapon entry. A small, quick weapon.

shield.content: Shield armor entry. Provides defensive protection.

helmet.content: Helmet armor entry. Protects the head.

plate.content: Plate armor entry. Heavy protective armor.

potion.content: Potion item entry. A consumable magical item.

key.content: Key item entry. Used to unlock doors and containers.

scroll.content: Scroll item entry. Contains magical or written information.

gold.content: Gold currency entry. The primary form of currency.

silver.content: Silver currency entry. Smaller denomination currency.

head.content: Head outfit entry. Items worn on the head.

neck.content: Neck outfit entry. Items worn around the neck.

torso.content: Torso outfit entry. Items worn on the torso.

legs.content: Legs outfit entry. Items worn on the legs.

hands.content: Hands outfit entry. Items worn on the hands.

accessories.content: Accessories outfit entry. Additional decorative items.

combat.content: Combat skill entry. Abilities related to fighting.

magic.content: Magic skill entry. Abilities related to spellcasting.

stealth.content: Stealth skill entry. Abilities related to avoiding detection.

strength.content: Strength stat entry. Physical power and might.

intelligence.content: Intelligence stat entry. Mental acuity and knowledge.

health.content: Health stat entry. Life force and vitality.

poisoned.content: Poisoned status effect. Affected by poison.

buffed.content: Buffed status effect. Temporarily enhanced abilities.

weakened.content: Weakened status effect. Temporarily reduced abilities.
